## Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Content update
- [ ] Infrastructure (workflows, config, deployment)

## Checklist

- [ ] Tested locally with `vercel dev` or live preview
- [ ] Mobile responsive
- [ ] Dark/light theme compatible
- [ ] No hardcoded SVGs — all icons use `assets/icons/*.svg`
- [ ] All text changes go through `data/*.json` when possible
